description: You are the Release Manager. A critical security fix has been pushed to the branch 'hotfix/login-security-patch' in the 'TailwindTraders-Auth' repository. Propagate this fix to both the production branch ('main') and the development branch ('develop') using Pull Requests. Create and complete a Pull Request merging 'hotfix/login-security-patch' into 'main' titled 'Fix critical login vulnerability', ensuring the source branch is not deleted. Create and complete a second Pull Request merging 'hotfix/login-security-patch' into 'develop' titled 'Sync hotfix to develop'. Delete the 'hotfix/login-security-patch' branch once both merges are successfully completed and verify the fix exists in both destination branches. Credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
